title: Festive Oat Pudding Parfait
description: A delicious and visually appealing dessert made with festive and floral flavors, crunchy texture, and creamy pudding.

ingredients.name: Store-bought Pudding
ingredients.notes: Choose a festive flavor like strawberry or blueberry.

instructions: In a large bowl, combine oats, festive spice mix, and floral honey. Mix well.
Add in the milk and stir until the oats are well coated.
Cover the bowl with a lid or plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
Just before serving, layer the chilled oat mixture with store-bought pudding and crunchy granola in a parfait glass or tall clear cup.
Repeat the layering process until all the ingredients are used up, finishing with a layer of pudding on top.
Refrigerate for an additional 30 minutes before serving.
Garnish with extra crunchy granola and a drizzle of floral honey, if desired.
